code: export function formatTime(ms){const totalCentiseconds=Math.floor(ms/10);const minutes=Math.floor(totalCentiseconds/6000);const seconds=Math.floor(totalCentiseconds%6000/100);const centiseconds=totalCentiseconds%100;return{minutes:String(minutes).padStart(2,'0'),seconds:String(seconds).padStart(2,'0'),centiseconds:String(centiseconds).padStart(2,'0'),raw:{minutes,seconds,centiseconds}};}export function isCentisecondsZero(ms){return Math.floor(ms/10)%100===0;}export function formatTimestamp(ts){const d=new Date(ts);return d.toLocaleDateString(undefined,{month:'short',day:'numeric',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});}
